get.description: Returns a greeting message from the Tedrisat service

get.summary: List the courses the current talebe is enrolled in
Get a course with its full syllabus, müderris and resources

put.summary: Replace a course, including its full syllabus, müderris and resources

post.summary: Enroll the current talebe in a course

put.summary: Update the current talebe's progress in a course

get.description: Retrieves a complete list of all available examples in the system

post.description: Creates a new example with the provided data and returns the created example

get.description: Retrieves a specific example by its unique identifier

delete.description: Permanently deletes an example by its ID. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieves all flashcards by matching a deck identifier
get.summary: Get all flashcards from a deck

get.description: Downloads a sample file to use as a template for bulk import. Not deck-specific.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format of the file to download

get.description: Retrieves a specific flashcard by its unique identifier

put.description: Replaces all properties of an existing flashcard with new values. This is a complete replacement operation.

patch.description: Updates specific properties of an existing flashcard. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a flashcard by its ID. This action cannot be undone.

get.description: Retrieves all flashcard decks that are either public or owned by the user, with optional includes for related data such as tags.

parameters.name: isPublic
parameters.description: When omitted returns public decks and user-owned private decks. When true returns only public decks. When false returns only user-owned private decks.

get.summary: Get all flashcard decks visible to the user

post.description: Creates a new flashcard deck with the provided details. Tags can be optionally associated with the deck.

get.summary: Get all flashcard decks in the user's collection

post.description: Creates multiple flashcards within a specified deck. All cards will be assigned to the same deck and author.
post.summary: Create multiple flashcards in a deck

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format of the file to download

get.description: Retrieves a single flashcard deck by its ID with optional includes for related data such as tags.

put.description: Replaces all properties of an existing flashcard deck with new values. This is a complete replacement operation.

patch.description: Updates specific properties of an existing flashcard deck. Only provided fields will be updated.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a flashcard deck by its ID. This action cannot be undone and will also remove all associated flashcards.

post.description: Creates a new association between a flashcard deck and the authenticated user.
post.summary: Add a deck to the user's collection

delete.summary: Delete a flashcard deck from user's collection

get.description: Returns the health status of the Tedrisat service

get.summary: Get a paginated list of köşks

post.summary: Follow a köşk as the current talebe

get.summary: List the courses that belong to a köşk

post.summary: Create a new course under a köşk

get.description: Returns a secure hello message from the Tedrisat service
Test endpoint that throws a validation error for demonstration purposes

get.summary: List pending enrollment requests for a köşk (owner only)

post.summary: Approve a pending enrollment (köşk owner only)

delete.summary: Reject a pending enrollment, deleting it (köşk owner only)

info.title: Tedrisat Service API
info.description: Education management service for Madrasah platform

timestamp.description: Timestamp when health check was performed

environment.description: Environment the service is running in

itemCount.description: Number of items on the current page

itemsPerPage.description: Maximum number of items per page

MedarisMetaPaginationResponse.description: Pagination metadata returned under the meta.pagination field in paginated API responses.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

row.description: Row number in the uploaded file (1-based)

subtitle.example: Klasik sarf metni — şerh, illet ve tatbiki örneklerle.

description.example: Klasik medrese müfredatına dayalı; sarf, nahiv ve usûl-i fıkıh dersleri sunan köşk.

scheduledAt.description: When the live session starts (type = LIVE).

meetingUrl.description: External meeting link (Meet/Zoom/Jitsi…). The platform is resolved from the URL on the client.

agenda.description: Müzakere akışı — agenda steps shown to students.

id.description: Existing müderris row id (preserved on replace)

userId.description: Linked platform user id, if any

id.description: Existing resource row id (preserved on replace)

summary.example: Müfredat tanıtımı ve birinci babın îsâgûcîsi.

isFollowing.description: Whether the current talebe follows this köşk

subtitle.example: Klasik sarf metni — şerh, illet ve tatbiki örneklerle.

description.example: Klasik medrese müfredatına dayalı; sarf, nahiv ve usûl-i fıkıh dersleri sunan köşk.
